case_for: Ertz's target volume culminated in a season-high 14.0-point week 7 performance, showing he can clear this threshold when the offense funnels him targets in the red zone.
case_against: His scoring has been wildly inconsistent with three of the last six games under 9 points, including a 3.0-point floor, making a repeat sub-12 outing entirely plausible.
